notes: Mechanical simulation uses RPC estimation and eth_call only; it is not realized execution proof.
Pre-live execution audit requires plan, submission, receipt, and journal records to stay in sync.
Fork execution requires an external signer and never stores private keys in planner or dashboard code.
liveTrading remains BLOCKED until architecture review and explicit canary approval.

items.label: refresh DEX quote and score
items.command: npm run quote:dex -- --route-key="bob:0x0555E30da8f98308EdB960aa94C0Db47230d2B9c->base:0x0555E30da8f98308EdB960aa94C0Db47230d2B9c" --amount="10000" --include-stable-entry && npm run score:gateway -- --write --route-key="bob:0x0555E30da8f98308EdB960aa94C0Db47230d2B9c->base:0x0555E30da8f98308EdB960aa94C0Db47230d2B9c" --amount="10000"

remediationPlan.followUpCommand: npm run report:prelive-readiness -- --write && npm run build:prelive-review-package -- --write && npm run status:dashboard && npm run write:session-handoff

paper.label: 관측 기준
paper.detail: 알려진 비용 반영 후 순이익이 아직 음수

livePolicyInterpretation.note: Research signals may justify more measurement, but they do not change canary or live policy until freshness and execution gaps are cleared.

conclusions: Gateway score candidates do not become actionable even under tiny profit thresholds because effective system PnL never turns positive.
Triangular arb looks small-positive under a looser 0.10% floor, but still does not meet the repo's current 0.50% policy.
